name: book2mp3-global-book-lexicon
description: Globales, editierbares Autoren- und Figurenlexikon fuer Aiken, Harrison und Rowling. Es dient als Wissensbasis fuer spaetere Metadaten-, UI- und XTTS-Integrationen.

characters.notes: Nikolai's twin brother from the Vorislav tiger family.

characters.name: Bannik Vorislav
characters.notes: Another recurring Vorislav sibling.

characters.name: Nessa Sheridan
characters.notes: Zach's sister and a referenced Magnus Pack connection.

characters.name: Gwendolyn O'Neill
characters.notes: Half lioness, half tigress hybrid from the Philly O'Neill line.

characters.name: Lachlan MacRyrie
characters.notes: Massive grizzly shifter and Gwen's mate.

characters.name: Mitchell O'Neill Shaw
characters.notes: Lion shifter related to Gwen through the O'Neill/Shaw family line.

characters.notes: Wolf shifter chef and recurring New York Pack/Pride figure.

characters.name: Jessica Ann Ward
characters.notes: Wild dog alpha and business leader tied to Gwen's wider circle.

characters.name: Blayne Thorpe
characters.notes: Hybrid shifter and Gwen's close friend.

characters.name: Sissy Mae Smith

characters.name: Gwenvael the Handsome

characters.name: Dagmar Reinholdt

characters.name: Bercelak the Great

characters.name: Harry Potter
characters.notes: The Boy Who Lived and central hero of the seven-book series.

characters.name: Hermione Jean Granger
characters.notes: Muggle-born witch, Gryffindor and one of the smartest witches of her generation.

characters.name: Ronald Bilius Weasley
characters.notes: Harry's loyal best friend and Gryffindor member of the central trio.

characters.name: Albus Dumbledore
characters.notes: Headmaster and mentor figure across the core series.

characters.name: Lord Voldemort
characters.notes: Dark wizard and defining antagonist of the Harry Potter arc.

entries.author: J.K. Rowling
book_title_aliases: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets of Dumbledore

characters.name: Newt Scamander
characters.notes: Magizoologist, traveler and author of Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them.

characters.name: Gellert Grindelwald
characters.notes: Dark wizard active during Newt's 1920s storyline.

characters.name: Teddy
characters.notes: Newt's mischievous Niffler companion.

characters.name: Pickett
characters.notes: Bowtruckle who often rides in Newt's top pocket.

characters.name: Bert Beamish
characters.notes: One of the ordinary children elevated into heroism in Cornucopia.

characters.name: Daisy Dovetail
characters.notes: Brave child heroine repeatedly highlighted in the official activity material.

characters.name: Mrs. Beamish
characters.notes: Named among the ordinary but heroic figures in the official guide.

characters.name: King Fred the Fearless
characters.notes: Cornucopia's celebrated moustachioed king.

characters.name: The Ickabog
characters.notes: Mythical creature at the center of the fairy tale and its fear politics.

characters.name: Jack
characters.notes: Little boy whose quest drives the story into the Land of the Lost.

characters.name: Dur Pig
characters.notes: Jack's beloved original toy pig.

characters.name: The Christmas Pig
characters.notes: Replacement toy who guides Jack through the magical quest.

characters.name: Cormoran Strike
characters.notes: Former soldier turned London private investigator.

characters.name: Robin Ellacott
characters.notes: Strike's investigative partner with strong psychological insight.

characters.name: Matthew Cunliffe
characters.notes: Robin's long-term boyfriend in the early Strike books.

characters.name: Charlotte Campbell
characters.notes: Strike's volatile ex-fiancée and recurring emotional pressure point.

characters.name: Will
characters.notes: The worried father's missing son whose case starts The Running Grave.
